◆ compute_displacements()

int compute_displacements ( int  compute_sources,
int  recompute_sd,
double  redshift 
)

Definition at line 286 of file fmax.c.

287{
288 /* This routine computes the displacement fields at a specified redshift
289 if recompute_sd is true, it recomputes the second derivatives */
290
291 double cputmp;
292
293#ifdef TWO_LPT
294
295 if (recompute_sd)
296 {
297 /* second derivatives are needed for LPT displacements, if not already in place they must be recomputed */
298 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
299 if (!ThisTask)
300 printf("\n[%s] Computing second derivatives\n", fdate());
301
302 ScaleDep.order = 0; /* sources are computed as for LambdaCDM at z=0 */
303 ScaleDep.redshift = 0.0;
304
305 if (compute_second_derivatives(0.0, 0))
306 return 1;
307
308 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
309 if (!ThisTask)
310 printf("[%s] Done second derivatives, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
311 cputime.deriv += cputmp;
312 }
313
314 /* computes the 2LPT and 3LPT displacement fields and stores them in the products */
315 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
316 if (!ThisTask)
317 printf("\n[%s] Computing LPT displacements\n", fdate());
318
319 if (compute_LPT_displacements(compute_sources, redshift))
320 return 1;
321
322 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
323 if (!ThisTask)
324 printf("[%s] Done LPT displacements, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
325 cputime.lpt += cputmp;
326
327#endif
328
329 /* computes Zeldovich displacements */
330 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
331 if (!ThisTask)
332 printf("[%s] Computing first derivatives\n", fdate());
333
334 /* for scale-dependent growth we compute the displacements for the first redshift segment
335 in case there is only one segment, this implies to compute them at the final redshift */
336 ScaleDep.redshift = redshift;
337 ScaleDep.order = 1; /* here we need the first-order growth */
338
339 if (compute_first_derivatives(0.0, 0, 1, kdensity[0]))
340 return 1;
341
342 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
343 if (!ThisTask)
344 printf("[%s] Done first derivatives, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
345 cputime.deriv += cputmp;
346
347 /* /\* Store Zeldovich displacements in the products *\/ */
348 /* cputmp=MPI_Wtime(); */
349 /* if (!ThisTask) */
350 /* printf("[%s] Storing velocities\n",fdate()); */
351
352 /* if (store_velocities()) */
353 /* return 1; */
354
355 /* cputmp=MPI_Wtime()-cputmp; */
356 /* if (!ThisTask) */
357 /* printf("[%s] Done storing velocities, cpu time = %f s\n",fdate(),cputmp); */
358 /* cputime.vel+=cputmp; */
359
360 return 0;
361}

int  ThisGrid,
int  order,
double *  vector 
)

Definition at line 190 of file fmax.c.

191{
192 /* computes second derivatives of the potential */
193
194 double timetmp = 0;
195
196 /* smoothing radius in grid units */
197 Rsmooth = R / MyGrids[ThisGrid].CellSize;
198
199 for (int ia = 1; ia <= 3; ia++)
200 {
201
202 if (!ThisTask)
203 printf("[%s] Computing 1st derivative: %d\n", fdate(), ia);
204
205 double tmp = MPI_Wtime();
206 write_in_cvector(ThisGrid, vector);
207 timetmp += MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
208
209 if (compute_derivative(ThisGrid, ia, 0))
210 return 1;
211
212 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
213 write_from_rvector_to_products(ThisGrid, ia - 1, order);
214 timetmp += MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
215 }
216
217 cputime.mem_transf += timetmp;
218 return 0;
219}

◆ compute_fmax()

int compute_fmax ( void  )

Definition at line 35 of file fmax.c.

36{
37 int ismooth, ThisGrid;
38 double cputmp, cpusm;
39
40 cputime.fmax = MPI_Wtime();
41
42 if (!ThisTask)
43 printf("[%s] First part: computation of collapse times\n", fdate());
44
45 ThisGrid = 0;
46
47 /*
48 TO EXTEND TO MULTIPLE GRIDS here we should
49
50 1) initialize fft for the large-scale grid (the same as the small-scale one?)
51 2) compute first derivatives of the large grid
52 3) compute second derivatives of the large grid
53 4) distribute to all processors and store the few used grid points
54 5) re-initialize fft for the small-scale grid
55 */
56
57 ScaleDep.order = 0; /* collapse times must be computed as for LambdaCDM */
58 ScaleDep.redshift = 0.0;
59
60 /****************************
61 * CYCLE ON SMOOTHING RADII *
62 ****************************/
63
64 for (ismooth = 0; ismooth < Smoothing.Nsmooth; ismooth++)
65 {
66 if (!ThisTask)
67 printf("\n[%s] Starting smoothing radius %d of %d (R=%9.5f, sigma=%9.5f)\n",
68 fdate(), ismooth + 1, Smoothing.Nsmooth, Smoothing.Radius[ismooth],
69 sqrt(Smoothing.Variance[ismooth]));
70
71 cpusm = MPI_Wtime();
72
73 /*
74 Part 1:
75 Compute second derivatives of the potential
76 */
77
78 if (!ThisTask)
79 printf("[%s] Computing second derivatives\n", fdate());
80
81 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
82
83 if (compute_second_derivatives(Smoothing.Radius[ismooth], ThisGrid))
84 return 1;
85
86 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
87 if (!ThisTask)
88 printf("[%s] Done second derivatives, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
89 cputime.deriv += cputmp;
90
91 /*
92 Part 2:
93 Compute collapse times
94 */
95
96 if (!ThisTask)
97 printf("[%s] Computing collapse times\n", fdate());
98
99 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
100
101#ifdef TABULATED_CT
102 /* initialize spline for interpolating collapse times */
103 if (initialize_collapse_times(ismooth, 0))
104 return 1;
105
106 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
107
108 if (!ThisTask)
109 {
110 if (strcmp(params.CTtableFile, "none"))
111 printf("[%s] Collapse times read from file %s\n", fdate(), params.CTtableFile);
112 else
113 printf("[%s] Collapse times computed for interpolation, cpu time =%f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
114 }
115
116 cputime.coll += cputmp;
117 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
118#endif
119
120 if (compute_collapse_times(ismooth))
121 return 1;
122
123#ifdef TABULATED_CT
124 /* this is needed only for debug options, to be removed in the official code */
125 if (reset_collapse_times(ismooth))
126 return 1;
127#endif
128
129 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
130 if (!ThisTask)
131 printf("[%s] Done computing collapse times, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
132 cputime.coll += cputmp;
133
134 /*
135End of cycle on smoothing radii
136 */
137
138 cpusm = MPI_Wtime() - cpusm;
139
140 if (!ThisTask)
141 printf("[%s] Completed, R=%6.3f, expected sigma: %7.4f, computed sigma: %7.4f, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(),
142 Smoothing.Radius[ismooth], sqrt(Smoothing.Variance[ismooth]),
143 sqrt(Smoothing.TrueVariance[ismooth]),
144 cpusm);
145
146 fflush(stdout);
147 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
148 }
149
150 /********************************
151 * COMPUTATION OF DISPLACEMENTS *
152 ********************************/
153
154 /* computes the displacements for all particles at zero smoothing,
155 assuming second derivatives are already in place
156 displacements are computed to the redshift of the first (or only) segment
157 */
158 cputmp = MPI_Wtime();
159 if (!ThisTask)
160 printf("\n[%s] Computing displacements for redshift %f\n", fdate(), ScaleDep.z[0]);
161
162 if (compute_displacements(1, 0, ScaleDep.z[0]))
163 return 1;
164
165 cputmp = MPI_Wtime() - cputmp;
166 if (!ThisTask)
167 printf("[%s] Done computing displacements, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), cputmp);
168
169 /***************/
170 /* END OF FMAX */
171 /***************/
172
173 if (finalize_fft())
174 return 1;
175
176 if (Fmax_PDF())
177 return 1;
178
179 cputime.fmax = MPI_Wtime() - cputime.fmax;
180 if (!ThisTask)
181 printf("[%s] Finishing fmax, total fmax cpu time = %14.6f\n"
182 "\t\t IO : %14.6f (%14.6f total time without I/O)\n"
183 "\t\t FFT : %14.6f\n"
184 "\t\t COLLAPSE : %14.6f\n",
185 fdate(), cputime.fmax, cputime.io, cputime.fmax - cputime.io, cputime.fft, cputime.coll);
186
187 return 0;
188}

◆ compute_second_derivatives()

int compute_second_derivatives ( double  R,
int  ThisGrid 
)

Definition at line 221 of file fmax.c.

222{
223
224 /* computes second derivatives of the potential */
225
226 double timetmp = 0;
227
228 /* smoothing radius in grid units */
229 Rsmooth = R / MyGrids[ThisGrid].CellSize;
230
231 for (int ia = 1; ia <= 3; ia++)
232 for (int ib = ia; ib <= 3; ib++)
233 {
234
235 int ider = (ia == ib ? ia : ia + ib + 1);
236
237 if (!ThisTask)
238 printf("[%s] Computing 2nd derivative: %d\n", fdate(), ider);
239
240 double tmp = MPI_Wtime();
241 write_in_cvector(ThisGrid, kdensity[ThisGrid]);
242 timetmp += MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
243
244 if (compute_derivative(ThisGrid, ia, ib))
245 return 1;
246
247 tmp = MPI_Wtime();
248 write_from_rvector(ThisGrid, second_derivatives[ThisGrid][ider - 1]);
249 timetmp += MPI_Wtime() - tmp;
250 }
251
252 cputime.mem_transf += timetmp;
253 return 0;
254}

◆ dump_products()

int dump_products ( void  )

Definition at line 419 of file fmax.c.

420{
421 /* dumps fmax products on files to reuse them */
422
423 struct stat dr;
424 FILE *file;
425 char fname[LBLENGTH];
426
427 /* Task 0 checks that the DumpProducts directory exists, or creates it
428 and writes a summary file to check that one does not start from a different run */
429 if (!ThisTask)
430 {
431 if (stat(params.DumpDir, &dr))
432 {
433 printf("Creating directory %s\n", params.DumpDir);
434 if (mkdir(params.DumpDir, 0755))
435 {
436 printf("ERROR IN CREATING DIRECTORY %s (task 0)\n", params.DumpDir);
437 return 1;
438 }
439 }
440
441 sprintf(fname, "%ssummary", params.DumpDir);
442 file = fopen(fname, "w");
443 fprintf(file, "%d # NTasks\n", NTasks);
444 fprintf(file, "%d # random seed\n", params.RandomSeed);
445 fprintf(file, "%d # grid size\n", params.GridSize[0]);
446 fprintf(file, "%d # length of product_data\n", (int)sizeof(product_data));
447 fclose(file);
448
449 /* dumps the true variances */
450 sprintf(fname, "%sTrueVariance", params.DumpDir);
451 file = fopen(fname, "wb");
452 fwrite(Smoothing.TrueVariance, sizeof(double), Smoothing.Nsmooth, file);
453 fclose(file);
454 }
455
456 /* all tasks must wait for Task 0 to open the directory (if needed) */
457 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
458
459 /* each task writes a separate dump file */
460 sprintf(fname, "%sTask.%d", params.DumpDir, ThisTask);
461 file = fopen(fname, "wb");
462 if (file == 0x0)
463 {
464 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not open file %s\n", ThisTask, fname);
465 return 1;
466 }
467
468 // NOTE: with LEAPFROG one needs to swap also kdensity and kvectors
469 fwrite(products, sizeof(product_data), MyGrids[0].total_local_size, file);
470 fclose(file);
471
472 return 0;
473}

◆ fdate()

char * fdate ( void  )

Definition at line 256 of file fmax.c.

257{
258 /* returns a 24-char string with the full date and time
259 (the year is moved at the middle of the string) */
260
261 time_t current_time;
262 char *string;
263 int n;
264
265 /* format from ctime:
266 0123456789
267 0123456789
268 0123
269 Www Mmm dd hh:mm:ss yyyy
270 */
271
272 current_time = time(NULL);
273 string = ctime(&current_time);
274
275 for (n = 0; n < 10; n++)
276 *(date_string + n) = *(string + n);
277 for (n = 10; n < 15; n++)
278 *(date_string + n) = *(string + n + 9);
279 for (n = 10; n < 19; n++)
280 *(date_string + n + 5) = *(string + n);
281 *(date_string + 24) = '\0';
282
283 return date_string;
284}
ValidateFits.n
str n
Definition ValidateFits.py:142
date_string

References date_string.

◆ Fmax_PDF()

int Fmax_PDF ( void  )

Definition at line 554 of file fmax.c.

555{
556
557 unsigned long long my_counter[NBINS], counter[NBINS], coll;
558
559 for (int i = 0; i < NBINS; i++)
560 my_counter[i] = 0;
561
562 for (int i = 0; i < MyGrids[0].total_local_size; i++)
563 {
564 int xF = (int)(products[i].Fmax * 10.);
565 if (xF < 0)
566 xF = 0;
567 if (xF >= NBINS)
568 xF = NBINS - 1;
569 my_counter[xF]++;
570 }
571
572 MPI_Reduce(my_counter, counter, NBINS, MPI_UNSIGNED_LONG_LONG, MPI_SUM, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
573
574 if (!ThisTask)
575 {
576 coll = 0;
577 for (int i = 10; i < NBINS; i++)
578 coll += counter[i];
579 printf("[%s] Number of collapsed particles to z=0: %Lu\n", fdate(), coll);
580
581 char filename[LBLENGTH];
582 sprintf(filename, "pinocchio.%s.FmaxPDF.out", params.RunFlag);
583 FILE *file = fopen(filename, "w");
584 fprintf(file, "# Fmax PDF over %Lu particles\n", MyGrids[0].Ntotal);
585 fprintf(file, "# 1-2: F interval\n");
586 fprintf(file, "# 3: number of particles in that interval\n");
587 fprintf(file, "#\n");
588 for (int i = 0; i < NBINS; i++)
589 fprintf(file, " %6.1f %6.1f %Lu\n", (double)i / 10.,
590 (i == NBINS - 1 ? 999.0 : (double)(i + 1) / 10.), counter[i]);
591 fclose(file);
592 }
593
594 return 0;
595}

◆ read_dumps()

int read_dumps ( void  )

Definition at line 475 of file fmax.c.

476{
477 /* reads in fmax products from files */
478 FILE *file;
479 char fname[LBLENGTH], buf[SBLENGTH];
480 int myNTasks, myRandomSeed, myGridSize, myPDlength;
481
482 /* Task 0 checks that the DumpProducts/summary exists and is compatible with the present run */
483 if (!ThisTask)
484 {
485 sprintf(fname, "%ssummary", params.DumpDir);
486 file = fopen(fname, "r");
487 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
488 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myNTasks);
489 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
490 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myRandomSeed);
491 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
492 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myGridSize);
493 (void)fgets(buf, SBLENGTH, file);
494 sscanf(buf, "%d", &myPDlength);
495 fclose(file);
496
497 int error = 0;
498 if (NTasks != myNTasks)
499 {
500 printf("ERROR: the number of tasks in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
501 fname, myNTasks, NTasks);
502 error++;
503 }
504 if (params.RandomSeed != myRandomSeed)
505 {
506 printf("ERROR: the random seed in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
507 fname, myRandomSeed, params.RandomSeed);
508 error++;
509 }
510 if (params.GridSize[0] != myGridSize)
511 {
512 printf("ERROR: the grid size in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
513 fname, myGridSize, params.GridSize[0]);
514 error++;
515 }
516 if (myPDlength != (int)sizeof(product_data))
517 {
518 printf("ERROR: the length of product_data in %s does not match - %d vs %d\n",
519 fname, myPDlength, (int)sizeof(product_data));
520 error++;
521 }
522 if (error)
523 return 1;
524
525 /* reads and broadcasts true variances */
526 sprintf(fname, "%sTrueVariance", params.DumpDir);
527 file = fopen(fname, "rb");
528 if (file == 0x0)
529 {
530 printf("ERROR on Task 0: could not open file %s\n", fname);
531 return 1;
532 }
533 fread(Smoothing.TrueVariance, sizeof(double), Smoothing.Nsmooth, file);
534 fclose(file);
535 }
536 MPI_Bcast(Smoothing.TrueVariance, Smoothing.Nsmooth, MPI_DOUBLE, 0, MPI_COMM_WORLD);
537
538 /* each task reads a separate dump file */
539 sprintf(fname, "%sTask.%d", params.DumpDir, ThisTask);
540 file = fopen(fname, "rb");
541 if (file == 0x0)
542 {
543 printf("ERROR on Task %d: could not open file %s\n", ThisTask, fname);
544 return 1;
545 }
546
547 // NOTE: with LEAPFROG one needs to read in also kdensity and kvectors
548 fread(products, sizeof(product_data), MyGrids[0].total_local_size, file);
549 fclose(file);
550
551 return 0;
552}
SBLENGTH
#define SBLENGTH
Definition pinocchio.h:58

References param_data::DumpDir, file, param_data::GridSize, LBLENGTH, MyGrids, smoothing_data::Nsmooth, NTasks, params, products, param_data::RandomSeed, SBLENGTH, Smoothing, ThisTask, and smoothing_data::TrueVariance.

Referenced by main().

Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ scale_products_displacements()

int scale_products_displacements ( double  z_prev,
double  z_curr 
)

Definition at line 370 of file fmax.c.

371{
372 /* Guard: if the two redshifts are equal, nothing to do */
373 if (z_prev == z_curr)
374 return 0;
375
376 /* Growth ratios for LambdaCDM / scale-independent case */
377 const double r1 = GrowingMode(z_curr, 0.0) / GrowingMode(z_prev, 0.0);
378#ifdef TWO_LPT
379 const double r2 = GrowingMode_2LPT(z_curr, 0.0) / GrowingMode_2LPT(z_prev, 0.0);
380#ifdef THREE_LPT
381 const double r31 = GrowingMode_3LPT_1(z_curr, 0.0) / GrowingMode_3LPT_1(z_prev, 0.0);
382 const double r32 = GrowingMode_3LPT_2(z_curr, 0.0) / GrowingMode_3LPT_2(z_prev, 0.0);
383#endif
384#endif
385
386 double timetmp = MPI_Wtime();
387 /* Scale current displacements in place; previous displacements are left
388 as-is (already containing the z_prev values after shift_all_displacements) */
389#pragma omp parallel for schedule(static)
390 for (long long idx = 0; idx < MyGrids[0].total_local_size; ++idx)
391 {
392 products[idx].Vel[0] *= r1;
393 products[idx].Vel[1] *= r1;
394 products[idx].Vel[2] *= r1;
395#ifdef TWO_LPT
396 products[idx].Vel_2LPT[0] *= r2;
397 products[idx].Vel_2LPT[1] *= r2;
398 products[idx].Vel_2LPT[2] *= r2;
399#ifdef THREE_LPT
400 products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[0] *= r31;
401 products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[1] *= r31;
402 products[idx].Vel_3LPT_1[2] *= r31;
403 products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[0] *= r32;
404 products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[1] *= r32;
405 products[idx].Vel_3LPT_2[2] *= r32;
406#endif
407#endif
408 }
409
410 timetmp = MPI_Wtime() - timetmp;
411 cputime.mem_transf += timetmp;
412 if (!ThisTask)
413 printf("[%s] Scaled displacements from z=%g to z=%g, cpu time = %f s\n", fdate(), z_prev, z_curr, timetmp);
414 return 0;
415}
